articles.title_en: 'Ghayal hoon isliye ghatak hoon': Raghav Chadha tears into AAP charges with Dhurandhar reference
summary_points: Raghav Chadha refuted allegations after being replaced as AAP's Rajya Sabha depu
ty leader, calling it a "coordinated attack." He denied claims of not joining op
position walkouts, refusing to sign an impeachment motion, and raising "trivial
articles.article_en: Raghav Chadha refuted allegations after being replaced as AAP's Rajya Sabha deputy leader, calling it a "coordinated attack." He denied claims of not joining opposition walkouts, refusing to sign an impeachment motion, and raising "trivial issues." Chadha asserted he has consistently raised significant public concerns in Parliament over his four-year tenure.

articles.title_en: Tamil Nadu election 2026: The big Annamalai question — what BJP gains, what it risks
summary_points: BJP leader K Annamalai clarified he chose not to contest the Tamil Nadu assembly
elections to focus on campaigning for the party and allies across multiple stat
es. His decision, accepted by the leadership, allows him a broader organizationa
articles.article_en: BJP leader K Annamalai clarified he chose not to contest the Tamil Nadu assembly elections to focus on campaigning for the party and allies across multiple states. His decision, accepted by the leadership, allows him a broader organizational role, aiming to boost NDA candidates' prospects.

articles.title_en: OpenClaw creator, who Altman hired for millions, reacts to Anthropic banning his AI Agent
summary_points: Anthropic has stopped supporting OpenClaw for its Claude subscriptions. This dec
ision follows a recent leak of Anthropic's Claude Code source code. Anthropic ci
tes increased demand and usage patterns of third-party tools as reasons for the
articles.article_en: Anthropic has stopped supporting OpenClaw for its Claude subscriptions. This decision follows a recent leak of Anthropic's Claude Code source code. Anthropic cites increased demand and usage patterns of third-party tools as reasons for the change. Subscribers will receive credits and can purchase discounted usage bundles. OpenClaw's creator expressed disappointment but acknowledged efforts to mitigate the impact.

articles.title_en: 'Dhurandhar 2' BO day 17: Ranveer Singh film eyes Rs 1,000 crore India net
summary_points: Aditya Dhar’s 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' is on the verge of history, eyeing the
Rs. 1,000 crore India net milestone on day 17. Starring Ranveer Singh, the spy
thriller has amassed Rs. 963.03 crore domestically and Rs. 1,523.58 crore global
articles.article_en: Aditya Dhar’s 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' is on the verge of history, eyeing the Rs. 1,000 crore India net milestone on day 17. Starring Ranveer Singh, the spy thriller has amassed Rs. 963.03 crore domestically and Rs. 1,523.58 crore globally. Despite ongoing IPL 2026 season, the film continues to shatter records, surpassing SS Rajamouli's 'Baahubali 2' in North America and outperforming the Shah Rukh Khan starrer 'Jawan' and Yash starrer 'KGF 2' in its trajectory.

articles.title_en: ‘Devil’ and gang: UP ATS cracks Pakistan-backed module targeting rail infrastructure
summary_points: Uttar Pradesh ATS arrested four individuals for allegedly operating a terror mod
ule directed by Pakistani handlers. The group planned arson attacks on railway i
nfrastructure and conducted reconnaissance of key installations across multiple
articles.article_en: Uttar Pradesh ATS arrested four individuals for allegedly operating a terror module directed by Pakistani handlers. The group planned arson attacks on railway infrastructure and conducted reconnaissance of key installations across multiple cities, aiming to create panic and economic disruption. They were apprehended before executing a major attack near Lucknow railway station.

articles.title_en: Why did Suryakumar Yadav replace Hardik Pandya as MI captain?
summary_points: Suryakumar Yadav led Mumbai Indians against Delhi Capitals.  Hardik Pandya was u
nwell and missed the match.  Delhi Capitals captain Axar Patel won the toss and
chose to bowl.  Mumbai Indians made several changes to their playing eleven.  Th
articles.article_en: Suryakumar Yadav led Mumbai Indians against Delhi Capitals.  Hardik Pandya was unwell and missed the match.  Delhi Capitals captain Axar Patel won the toss and chose to bowl.  Mumbai Indians made several changes to their playing eleven.  The match took place at the Arun Jaitley Stadium in Delhi.  Both teams announced their playing XIs and impact substitutes.

articles.title_en: Reason the 6am email from 'Oracle leadership' told thousands of laid-off employees
summary_points: Oracle has begun its largest-ever round of layoffs, with employees receiving ter
mination emails from "Oracle Leadership" at 6AM saying their roles had been elim
inated after "careful consideration of Oracle's current business needs." Around
articles.article_en: Oracle has begun its largest-ever round of layoffs, with employees receiving termination emails from "Oracle Leadership" at 6AM saying their roles had been eliminated after "careful consideration of Oracle's current business needs." Around 10,000 employees have reportedly been cut so far, with estimates suggesting the total could reach 30,000. The email gave employees a narrow window to act before systems were deactivated.

articles.title_en: Trump mulls big Cabinet shake-up as Iran war backlash deepens: Report
summary_points: US President Trump is reportedly considering a significant Cabinet reshuffle ami
d growing concerns over the Iran war's political fallout and rising fuel prices.
Frustration over falling approval ratings and midterm election anxieties are f
articles.article_en: US President Trump is reportedly considering a significant Cabinet reshuffle amid growing concerns over the Iran war's political fallout and rising fuel prices.  Frustration over falling approval ratings and midterm election anxieties are fueling discussions about replacing senior officials, including intelligence chief Tulsi Gabbard and commerce secretary Howard Lutnick.  The administration faces pressure to project strength and address economic worries.

articles.title_en: A land that floats, a deer that ‘dances’: Inside world’s only floating national park in Manipur
summary_points: Manipur's Keibul Lamjao National Park, home to the world's only floating nationa
l park and the endangered Sangai deer, faces significant challenges. Rediscovere
d from near extinction, the Sangai's survival is intrinsically linked to the del
articles.article_en: Manipur's Keibul Lamjao National Park, home to the world's only floating national park and the endangered Sangai deer, faces significant challenges. Rediscovered from near extinction, the Sangai's survival is intrinsically linked to the delicate phumdi ecosystem, now threatened by climate change and habitat degradation.

articles.title_en: Delhi govt tightens noose: Businesses to get LPG only if they apply for PNG connection
summary_points: Delhi's commercial LPG supply now requires users to register for piped natural g
as (PNG) where available, or declare intent to switch. Oil marketing companies w
ill verify these applications, sharing data with IGL. Businesses needing both ca
articles.article_en: Delhi's commercial LPG supply now requires users to register for piped natural gas (PNG) where available, or declare intent to switch. Oil marketing companies will verify these applications, sharing data with IGL. Businesses needing both can seek exemptions, ensuring compliance with the government's push for PNG adoption.

articles.title_en: Amazon internal memo 'confirms' AWS centres hit in Dubai and Bahrain; no timeline for recovery
summary_points: Amazon Web Services (AWS) centers in Dubai and Bahrain are experiencing signific
ant disruptions following Iranian strikes, with "hard down" regions expected to
be unavailable for an extended period. The company is prioritizing customer migr
articles.article_en: Amazon Web Services (AWS) centers in Dubai and Bahrain are experiencing significant disruptions following Iranian strikes, with "hard down" regions expected to be unavailable for an extended period. The company is prioritizing customer migration to other regions due to the scale of damage and has no timeline for restoring normal operations.

Indians.  Mumbai Indians faced a setback as captain Hardik Pandya was absent due
to illness, with Suryakumar Yadav leading the team.  Changes were made to Mumba
articles.article_en: Delhi Capitals captain Axar Patel won the toss and chose to bowl against Mumbai Indians.  Mumbai Indians faced a setback as captain Hardik Pandya was absent due to illness, with Suryakumar Yadav leading the team.  Changes were made to Mumbai's lineup, including the inclusion of Deepak Chahar and Bosch.

articles.title_en: Why Pat Cummins left SRH camp and travelled back home - Explained
summary_points: Sunrisers Hyderabad's Pat Cummins has flown back to Australia for a scheduled sc
an on his injured back, a condition that previously ruled him out of the T20 Wor
ld Cup.  The pacer had a brief stint with the SRH camp for light training. Crick
articles.article_en: Sunrisers Hyderabad's Pat Cummins has flown back to Australia for a scheduled scan on his injured back, a condition that previously ruled him out of the T20 World Cup.  The pacer had a brief stint with the SRH camp for light training. Cricket Australia will oversee the assessment, with Ishan Kishan continuing as captain in Cummins' absence.

articles.title_en: Watch: 60-foot-high swing ride carrying 80 people collapses in UP
summary_points: A 60-foot-high swing ride at the Bhainsaha Mela in Kushinagar collapsed mid-oper
ation, injuring at least 30 people, including women and children. The overcrowde
d ride reportedly failed due to a weak, improperly anchored base. Rescue efforts
articles.article_en: A 60-foot-high swing ride at the Bhainsaha Mela in Kushinagar collapsed mid-operation, injuring at least 30 people, including women and children. The overcrowded ride reportedly failed due to a weak, improperly anchored base. Rescue efforts were challenging, with critically injured individuals transferred to hospitals.

articles.title_en: Russia attacks Ukraine with drones: 5 killed, 19 injured as strikes hit Nikopol market
summary_points: A Russian drone strike on a market in Nikopol, Ukraine, resulted in at least fiv
e deaths and 19 injuries, including a critically wounded 14-year-old girl. The p
rosecutor general's office condemned the attack as a war crime. This incident fo
articles.article_en: A Russian drone strike on a market in Nikopol, Ukraine, resulted in at least five deaths and 19 injuries, including a critically wounded 14-year-old girl. The prosecutor general's office condemned the attack as a war crime. This incident follows a pattern of increased Russian strikes on Ukraine, with other attacks also causing casualties.

articles.title_en: India rejects 'payment issues' claim over Iranian crude tanker's diversion to China
summary_points: Reports of an Iranian crude oil shipment rerouted to China due to payment issues
have been officially denied by India's Petroleum Ministry. The ministry clarifi
ed that such diversions are common in global oil trade for optimization and assu
articles.article_en: Reports of an Iranian crude oil shipment rerouted to China due to payment issues have been officially denied by India's Petroleum Ministry. The ministry clarified that such diversions are common in global oil trade for optimization and assured that Indian refiners have secured their energy supplies, including from Iran, with no payment hurdles.

summary_points: As elections approach, political campaigns are transcending religious and caste
boundaries. Leaders from various parties are seen participating in religious cer
emonies across different faiths and visiting community memorials. This strategic
articles.article_en: As elections approach, political campaigns are transcending religious and caste boundaries. Leaders from various parties are seen participating in religious ceremonies across different faiths and visiting community memorials. This strategic shift aims to consolidate a significant minority vote and appeal to all segments of the electorate.

articles.title_en: ‘This has happened before’: How science explains Déjà Vu and the feeling of life on replay
summary_points: An uncanny feeling of having lived a moment before, known as déjà vu, is explore
d by scientists. This sensation, often dismissed as a trick of the mind, is now
understood as a healthy brain's 'fact-checking' mechanism detecting a mismatch b
articles.article_en: An uncanny feeling of having lived a moment before, known as déjà vu, is explored by scientists. This sensation, often dismissed as a trick of the mind, is now understood as a healthy brain's 'fact-checking' mechanism detecting a mismatch between familiarity and reality. Researchers suggest it reveals much about memory and perception.

carries a valuation of Rs 80 crores, presenting an opulent haven. This picturesq
ue getaway boasts earthy decor, a breathtaking pool area highlighted by a serene
articles.article_en: Salman Khan's luxurious Panvel estate, Arpita Farms, sprawls over 150 acres and carries a valuation of Rs 80 crores, presenting an opulent haven. This picturesque getaway boasts earthy decor, a breathtaking pool area highlighted by a serene Buddha statue, and a full-fledged gym ideal for fitness enthusiasts.

summary_points: Rahul Gandhi accused Kerala's LDF and BJP of a hidden understanding, claiming Ch
ief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan aligns with those attacking minorities nationwide.
Gandhi highlighted a senior Left leader's presence as proof of a fundamental sh
articles.article_en: Rahul Gandhi accused Kerala's LDF and BJP of a hidden understanding, claiming Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan aligns with those attacking minorities nationwide. Gandhi highlighted a senior Left leader's presence as proof of a fundamental shift in the LDF, asserting it has lost its 'Left' identity and is now guided by a communal 'hidden hand' in partnership with the BJP-RSS..

articles.article_en: The Bangladesh Cricket Board has reached out to the BCCI to explore new avenues of cricketing cooperation, aiming to strengthen bilateral ties. This comes after a period of strained relations, but recent diplomatic improvements suggest a positive outlook for future engagements between the two nations.

he leak of sensitive information concerning astrologer Ashok Kharat's rape case.
This follows activist Anjali Damania's claims of high-profile politicians, incl
articles.article_en: Maharashtra Industries Minister Uday Samant has demanded an investigation into the leak of sensitive information concerning astrologer Ashok Kharat's rape case. This follows activist Anjali Damania's claims of high-profile politicians, including Deputy Chief Minister Eknath Shinde, contacting the accused. Samant dismissed the allegations as a smear campaign against Shinde.

evere financial hardship. He received only a portion of the promised payment and
is now in the ICU battling for his life. The incident highlights the desperatio

He received only a portion of the promised payment and is now in the ICU battling for his life. The incident highlights the desperation faced by vulnerable individuals in pursuit of education.

articles.article_en: Devdutt Padikkal is transforming into a T20 force, showcasing an aggressive shift in his batting after a blistering 61. He credits mental reset and technical fine-tuning with RCB's think tank for his evolution. Padikkal remains focused on his role in the explosive RCB lineup and the ultimate goal of representing India.

articles.article_en: Virat Kohli has made an immediate impact in the IPL, leading Royal Challengers Bengaluru to a season-opening victory. Despite a break and time spent in London with family, Kohli's performance remains strong. He humorously addressed social media jokes about his overseas status, emphasizing his commitment to the sport and the validation that comes with hard-earned success.

summary_points: Iran has shot down two US military aircraft, an F-15E Strike Eagle and an A-10 a
ttack aircraft, marking the first such incidents in over two decades. Despite US
claims of Iran's weakened capabilities, these events highlight Tehran's continu
articles.article_en: Iran has shot down two US military aircraft, an F-15E Strike Eagle and an A-10 attack aircraft, marking the first such incidents in over two decades. Despite US claims of Iran's weakened capabilities, these events highlight Tehran's continued ability to retaliate, possibly with shoulder-fired missiles, even as US forces conduct extensive operations.

articles.article_en: A woman named Bharathi was critically injured after being struck by a car while crossing the road with her daughter in Bantwal taluk. The incident, captured on CCTV, occurred in Sajipamunnur, Dakshina Kannada district. She is currently receiving treatment at a private hospital in Mangaluru, and a case has been registered.

ng daughters were discovered dead in a swimming pool. The woman's father alleges
her husband murdered them, suspecting the unborn child was also a girl, and is
articles.article_en: A tragic incident unfolded in Warangal where a 26-year-old woman and her two young daughters were discovered dead in a swimming pool. The woman's father alleges her husband murdered them, suspecting the unborn child was also a girl, and is now absconding. Police are actively searching for the accused as an investigation is underway.

articles.title_en: Going on vacation? Don’t water your plants; try this home gardening hack
summary_points: Frequent travellers can now maintain thriving gardens with a simple straw mulchi
ng hack. This technique locks in moisture, regulates soil temperature and suppre
sses weeds, allowing plants to flourish for up to a week without extra watering.
articles.article_en: Frequent travellers can now maintain thriving gardens with a simple straw mulching hack. This technique locks in moisture, regulates soil temperature and suppresses weeds, allowing plants to flourish for up to a week without extra watering. Gardening expert reveals how proper application ensures that the gardens stay healthy during extended absences.

summary_points: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister M K Stalin has strongly criticized the CBSE's new curr
iculum framework. He labels it a linguistic imposition that favors Hindi over re
gional languages. Stalin argues this policy undermines federalism and marginaliz
articles.article_en: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister M K Stalin has strongly criticized the CBSE's new curriculum framework. He labels it a linguistic imposition that favors Hindi over regional languages. Stalin argues this policy undermines federalism and marginalizes non-Hindi-speaking states. He urges the Union government to respect India's linguistic diversity and protect students' rights across all states

articles.article_en: Debris from an aerial interception struck a building in Dubai Marina, authorities confirmed Saturday. No fire or injuries were reported following the incident, which occurred amid ongoing regional conflict. This follows earlier attacks in the UAE, including one at a gas facility and a fire on a Kuwaiti oil tanker.

articles.article_en: A young man was critically injured after attempting to board a moving train at Bhopal Junction, becoming trapped and dragged between the train and the platform. The harrowing incident, captured on CCTV, highlights the dangers of boarding trains in motion. Railway officials are investigating, emphasizing passenger safety and urging adherence to precautions.

articles.title_en: In Nalanda, faith turned fatal

e in Nalanda, Bihar. The temple, which normally holds 500-1,000 people, was over
whelmed, triggering a stampede that claimed nine lives. Victims’ families allege
articles.article_en: On March 31, over 10,000 devotees, mostly women, thronged the Sheetla Mata temple in Nalanda, Bihar. The temple, which normally holds 500-1,000 people, was overwhelmed, triggering a stampede that claimed nine lives. Victims’ families allege that priests let devotees enter through the exit gate after collecting money. Amit Bhelari reports on how poor crowd management and inadequate arrangements worsened the tragedy

summary_points: A Times investigation found that abductions of women and girls from Syria’s Alaw
ite minority were more common, and more brutal, than the government has acknowle
dged.
articles.article_en: A Times investigation found that abductions of women and girls from Syria’s Alawite minority were more common, and more brutal, than the government has acknowledged.

articles.title_en: Rima Hassan Is Charged With Glorifying Terrorism Online in Social Media Post
summary_points: Rima Hassan, a member of the European Parliament, could face seven years in pris
on for the post, in which she quoted a perpetrator of a 1972 massacre in Israel.
articles.article_en: Rima Hassan, a member of the European Parliament, could face seven years in prison for the post, in which she quoted a perpetrator of a 1972 massacre in Israel.

articles.title_en: Cosmopolitan Shanghai Is an Uneasy Fit in China’s Narrative of Western Sins
summary_points: Shanghai’s many layers of architecture, culture and politics have made it a diff
icult fit for the Communist Party’s preferred narrative of Chinese victimhood an
d Western sins.
articles.article_en: Shanghai’s many layers of architecture, culture and politics have made it a difficult fit for the Communist Party’s preferred narrative of Chinese victimhood and Western sins.

articles.title_en: Myanmar Junta Chief Ascends to President, Five Years After Coup
summary_points: U Min Aung Hlaing’s elevation to the civilian post is the conclusion of election
s in the country, which were stage managed by the military.
articles.article_en: U Min Aung Hlaing’s elevation to the civilian post is the conclusion of elections in the country, which were stage managed by the military.

articles.title_en: In a Muzzled Russia, He Still Speaks His Mind
summary_points: While hundreds of other journalists fled into exile after Moscow’s invasion of U
kraine in 2022, the Nobel Peace Prize laureate Dmitri A. Muratov stayed. But he
did not stay quiet.
articles.article_en: While hundreds of other journalists fled into exile after Moscow’s invasion of Ukraine in 2022, the Nobel Peace Prize laureate Dmitri A. Muratov stayed. But he did not stay quiet.

articles.title_en: Three Charged With Arson in Attack on U.K. Jewish Charity’s Ambulances
summary_points: Two men and a teenager were arrested this week, the London police said, adding t
hat the March attack had not been declared a terrorist incident.
articles.article_en: Two men and a teenager were arrested this week, the London police said, adding that the March attack had not been declared a terrorist incident.

articles.title_en: Missing Airman Raises Concerns That Iran Could Gain Leverage Over the U.S.
summary_points: Since 1979, Iran has repeatedly used Americans and Europeans detained on its ter
ritory to win concessions over more powerful adversaries.
articles.article_en: Since 1979, Iran has repeatedly used Americans and Europeans detained on its territory to win concessions over more powerful adversaries.

articles.title_en: Living Space
summary_points: We don’t have to travel to the moon to gain some of the insight that astronauts
do.
articles.article_en: We don’t have to travel to the moon to gain some of the insight that astronauts do.

articles.title_en: Stephen Lewis Was a Singular Man on a Mission
summary_points: Heartbreaking scenes of death from H.I.V. in Africa enraged and fueled the work
of the Canadian AIDS activist and politician who died on Tuesday.

articles.title_en: Trump Pledged a Quick End to the Iran War, but He Hasn’t Explained How
summary_points: President Trump bet that American firepower could cow Iran into compliance. So f
ar, Iran’s leaders have been unwilling to quit.
articles.article_en: President Trump bet that American firepower could cow Iran into compliance. So far, Iran’s leaders have been unwilling to quit.

articles.title_en: ‘Iran Is Being Destroyed in Front of Our Eyes’: Tehran Is Gripped by Fear
summary_points: Fifteen residents of Tehran said in telephone interviews and text messages that
the capital was weathering heavy bombardment Friday.
